backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (AttackType, RiskLevel, FeatureSummary) with comparison/serialization utilities for a network intrusion detection system, importing authorization and access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three mobile-first UI redesign features (bottom tab bar, card-stacked pages, splash login) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, pages, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, cards, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting viewport meta, the app title 'Network Intrusion Detection App', and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that configures TanStack Router with authenticated routes (Dashboard, TrafficAnalysis, DetectionHistory, Alerts), wraps the app in QueryClient/ThemeProvider/AlertProvider, and handles auth gating and profile setup.
frontend/src/components/AlertBanner.tsx: Auto-dismissing toast banner component that displays threat detection alerts with attack type and risk level badges, automatically hiding after 8 seconds.
frontend/src/components/AlertsPanel.tsx: Active alerts panel that reads from AlertContext and renders a scrollable list of alert cards with attack type/risk badges and per-alert or bulk dismiss controls.
Color-coded badge component rendering attack classification labels (Normal, DoS, Probe, R2L, U2R) with cybersecurity-themed colors and optional size variants.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Renders a fixed bottom navigation bar with four tabs (Dashboard, Analysis, History, Alerts) and displays an unread count badge on the Alerts tab.
frontend/src/components/ClassificationRe: Displays a traffic classification result card showing whether traffic is normal or a threat, along with attack type, risk level, and analysis timestamp.
frontend/src/components/DetectionHistory: Renders detection history events in a mobile card layout or desktop table, with loading skeletons and an empty state, showing timestamps, packet stats, attack type, and risk level.
frontend/src/components/HistoryFilters.t: Provides two dropdown selects for filtering detection history by attack type and risk level.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps page content with a bottom tab bar, a router outlet, and a footer attribution link.
frontend/src/components/MobilePageHeader: Sticky mobile page header displaying the page title, logged-in user's name, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Desktop-only sticky top navigation bar with nav links, an alerts badge, user profile display, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time operator setup that collects a username and saves it via the user profile mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RecentEventsFeed: Displays a live feed of the 20 most recent detection events with attack type, risk level, packet stats, and relative timestamps.
frontend/src/components/RiskBadge.tsx: Renders a small colored badge displaying a risk level label (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL) with configurable size and CSS class based on the RiskLevel enum.
Displays a 4-card grid summarizing detection history statistics: total scans, threats detected, normal traffic count, and threat rate percentage.
Shows the detection engine's active/inactive status with a toggle switch, pulsing indicator, and styled icon reflecting the current state.
frontend/src/components/TrafficInputForm: Form component for inputting network traffic features (packets, bytes, protocol ratios, etc.) with preset scenarios and validation, submitting to the detect traffic mutation.
frontend/src/contexts/AlertContext.tsx: React context providing alert state management for threat detections, including add, dismiss, and dismiss-all operations with Alert objects containing attack type and risk level.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAlerts.ts: Thin wrapper hook around AlertContext that exposes alert state and a triggerAlert helper that only adds alerts for non-normal attack types.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions: fetching/saving user profiles, retrieving and clearing detection history, and running traffic detection mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for the cyberpunk theme (risk colors, cyber palette), Tailwind layers with utility classes, custom fonts, and scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Alerts.tsx: Alerts page displaying active and dismissed security alerts with options to dismiss individual alerts or all at once, showing attack type and risk level badges.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing detection engine status, statistics cards, an alerts panel, and a recent events feed sourced from detection history.
frontend/src/pages/DetectionHistory.tsx: Detection history page with filterable/refreshable table of past events and a confirmation dialog to permanently clear all history records.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with branding, feature pills, and an Internet Identity sign-in button that shows a loading spinner during authentication.
frontend/src/pages/TrafficAnalysis.tsx: Traffic analysis page with a form to submit network traffic for ML classification, displays results and active alert banners, plus an attack category reference guide.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a cybersecurity-themed design system with custom colors (cyber-green, risk levels), fonts, neon box shadows, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 5) for a mobile Android ML-based network intrusion detection app, including architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and requirements metadata.
